players.name: Xeebs
matchupItemFlags: no armor vs a 3-physical enemy comp

diagnostics.headline: deaths 1 vs the 4 norm — above the usual level

notes: Their main damage was Revenant (13k physical); 2/5 of us itemized armor.
Enemy ran 2/5 on or near their meta core.

draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Cuban Noobster (midlane→carry).

notes: 🎮 private (midlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-2 into a numbers advantage.
Xeebs (offlane) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
They traded the fight for Fangtooth across the map — we won bodies but gave the objective.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Kwang Surge of the Heavens (knockup 0.5s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
synergy: Our engage/CC: Lt. Belica Neural Disruptor (silence 0.5s). Our kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
We have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where our heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
ourKits.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
ourKits.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
ourKits.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
ourKits.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

ourKits.combo: Boreal Sweep slow → Hoarfrost root → Glacial Charge engage → Cryoseism stun ult
ourKits.winCondition: chain frost CC (slow→root→stun) to lock the fight down
ourKits.playWith: burst that converts her long CC chain into kills
ourKits.playAgainst: she's a CC battery — cleanse/QSS the Cryoseism stun; spread to avoid the chain

enemyKits.combo: Pounce → Rumble slow → Boulder Throw → Behemoth ult to brawl
enemyKits.winCondition: engage with Pounce, grow with Behemoth and out-sustain the fight
enemyKits.passive: ramping health regen for jungle sustain
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up damage while he front-lines and CCs
enemyKits.playAgainst: anti-heal and kiting beat his sustain brawl; burst him before Behemoth

enemyKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
enemyKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
enemyKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
enemyKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

enemyKits.combo: Scar mark → Obliterate homing missiles → Reckoning 1v1 realm ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Reckoning a target into the Nether Realm and crit them down 1v1
enemyKits.playWith: a team to clean up if his 1v1 stalls
enemyKits.playAgainst: the ult is a 1v1 — peel the realmed ally can't help, so don't be caught alone; he's crit-reliant early-weak

enemyKits.combo: Judgement tether → Surge knockup → Fury of the Heavens slow, recall the blade
enemyKits.winCondition: tether a target, knock up and brawl with energized basics
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up while he tethers and knocks up
enemyKits.playAgainst: bait his blade-recall mobility, then punish when it's placed

enemyKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
enemyKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
enemyKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
